abstract: Automated workflow that migrates React UI code to Base UI (@base-ui/react). Ships a snapshotted catalog of 37 components mapped to the bespoke patterns and prior libraries (Radix UI, Headless UI, Reach UI) they replace, plus scripts to refresh the catalog from base-ui.com/llms.txt, scan a codebase for migration candidates, fetch per-component docs on demand, and verify the migration compiles. Triggers on phrases like 'migrate to base-ui' or when a React file contains bespoke modals, dropdown menus, popovers, or other component-library imports that Base UI replaces 1:1.
